steps.name: statement-draft-surface-inventory
steps.summary: FS1 inventoried 1109/1115/1116 review-pack fields that can feed balance sheet, income statement, OCI, and note candidates. Next FS2 should add a common StatementLineCandidate schema and adapters that start from journal_entry lines, then enrich with classification/path/measurement and human-review questions.

steps.name: statement-line-schema
steps.summary: FS2 added kifrs/workflows/statement_draft with StatementLineCandidate schema plus 1109/1115/1116 review-pack adapters. Journal-entry lines now map to balance_sheet/income_statement/note candidates, enriched with citations and human-review questions. Verified by tests/test_statement_draft.py and review-pack/disclosure regression tests.

steps.name: 1109-statement-draft-pilot
steps.summary: FS3 preserved 1109 subsequent measurement entries in ScenarioOutcome/ReviewPack and extended statement_draft adapters so AC/FVOCI/FVPL interest, PL fair-value gains/losses, and OCI fair-value gains/losses become StatementLineCandidate rows. Verified with statement draft and 1109 regression tests.

steps.name: 1115-statement-draft-pilot
steps.summary: FS4 hardened the 1115 statement draft pilot: material-right, significant-financing, and repurchase financing review packs now produce explicit revenue, contract liability, receivable, deferred financing income, financial liability, and finance cost candidates, with measurement note amounts. Verified with statement draft, 1115 workflow, and 1115 review-pack tests.
